prompt: Please do the task stated in `/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2_generation_prompts.md`, where the TASK_ID is `d56f2372`.
codex_response:
Implemented `d56f2372` as a new ARC2 task package. The rule is: group the input by color, find the unique same-color partition whose bounding-box image is invariant under left-right mirror, and return that partition cropped to its bounding rectangle. The summary hint was usable after checking it against the official examples; the only important implementation detail was to treat whole color partitions, not 4-connected components, as the candidate shapes.

The task package is [__init__.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_d56f2372/__init__.py), [verifier.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_d56f2372/verifier.py), and [generator.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_d56f2372/generator.py). No shared primitive was added. The generator builds one vertically symmetric row-motif partition plus 3-4 asymmetric distractors from the same family, then places them as isolated colored partitions on a black canvas.

Verification passed end-to-end: official examples `4/4`, generated examples `1000/1000`. Artifacts are at [task.json](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/d56f2372/task.json), [originals.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/d56f2372/previews/originals.png), [preview_01.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/d56f2372/previews/preview_01.png), [preview_02.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/d56f2372/previews/preview_02.png), and [preview_03.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/d56f2372/previews/preview_03.png).
